title: Sub-Zero, Wolf, and Cove ransomware incident

extortion.description: Sub-Zero, Wolf, and Cove is an American brand of residential major kitchen appliances including refrigeration and preservation products. Sub-Zero, Wolf, and Cove corporate office is located in 4717 Hammersley Rd, Madison, Wisconsin, 53711, United States and has 2,648 employees. The total amount of data leakage is 760.60 GB
